zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Margaret Sandford於1366年6月6日出生在英國戴文時，她的父親Edmund De Sandford41歲，母親Katherine Ughtred28歲。她於1381年與Sir Robert Dunham II在英國戴文結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1400年在英國英格蘭戴文享年35歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Margaret Sandford于1366年6月6日出生在英国戴文时，她的父亲Edmund De Sandford41岁，母亲Katherine Ughtred28岁。她于1381年与Sir Robert Dunham II在英国戴文结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1400年在英国英格兰戴文享年35岁。

nameMeanings.name: Sandford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of numerous places in England with names derived from Old English sand ‘sand’ + ford ‘ford, river crossing’, such as Sandford in Warcop (Westmorland), Sandford in Sonning and Dry Sandford in Abingdon (both Berkshire), Sandford on Thames and Sandford Saint Martin (both Oxfordshire), Great and Little Sampford (Essex), Sandford Orcas (Dorset), Sandford, Sampford Courtney, Sampford Peverell, and Sampford Spiney (all Devon), Sampford Arundel and Sampford Brett (both Somerset), and Sandford (Shropshire). See also Sandiford .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Margaret Sandford was born on 6 June 1366, in Devon, England, her father, Edmund De Sandford, was 41 and her mother, Katherine Ughtred, was 28. She married Sir Robert Dunham II in 1381, in Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1400, in Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 35.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Margaret Sandford est née le 6 juin 1366, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Edmund De Sandford, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Katherine Ughtred, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Dunham II en 1381, à Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1400, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 35 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Margaret Sandford am 6. Juni 1366 in Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edmund De Sandford 41 und ihre Mutter Katherine Ughtred 28. Sie hat 1381 in Devon, England Sir Robert Dunham II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1400 im Alter von 35 Jahren in Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Margaret Sandford è nata il il 6 giugno 1366 nel Devon, England, sua padre, Edmund De Sandford, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Katherine Ughtred, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Dunham II nel 1381, nel Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì circa 1400, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 35 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Margaret Sandfordが1366年6月6日にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Edmund De Sandfordは41歳，母Katherine Ughtredは28歳であった。1381年にイギリスデボンでSir Robert Dunham IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1400年にイギリスイギリスデボンで35歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Margaret Sandford(이)가 1366년 6월 6일 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edmund De Sandford(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Ughtred(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 데폰에서 Sir Robert Dunham II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 35세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Margaret Sandford nasceu em 6 de junho de 1366, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Edmund De Sandford, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Ughtred, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Dunham II em 1381, em Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1400, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 35 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Margaret Sandford родилась 6 июня 1366 г. в местности девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Edmund De Sandford было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Ughtred, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Dunham II в 1381 г. в местности девон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1400 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 35 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Margaret Sandford nació el 6 de junio de 1366, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Edmund De Sandford, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Katherine Ughtred, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Dunham II en 1381, en Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1400, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 35 años.
